Class Player

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player.Player
All Implemented Interfaces:
MementoManager<PlayerMemento>
public class Player extends Object implements MementoManager<PlayerMemento>
Represents a Mesos player. Holds the player's nickname, totem, food total, prestige-point total, tribe cards, and buildings. Notifies registered PlayerObservers on every state change.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Builds a player from a DTO snapshot.
    Player(String nickname, COLOR color)
    Builds a player with the provided nickname and totem color.
    Player(String nickname, COLOR color, ServerVirtualView virtualView)
    Builds a player and subscribes the provided virtual view as observer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addBuilding(BuildingCard buildingCard)
    Adds a building card to the player's building area.
    void
    addCardToTribe(Card card)
    Adds a non-building card to the player's tribe.
    void
    addObserver(PlayerObserver observerToAdd)
    Subscribes an observer.
    int
    checkpoints()
    Computes the end-game prestige points earned from tribe cards: artists (every 2 = 10 PP), builders (fixed PP per card), and inventors (count × number of distinct inventor icons).
    PlayerMemento
    createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the current player state: nickname, totem colour, food amount, prestige points, tribe serialised as DTOs, and owned building IDs.
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
    Two players are equal if they share the same nickname and totem.
    int
    getArtistNumber()
    Returns the number of Artist cards in the player's tribe.
    int
    getBuilderDiscount()
    Returns the total food discount granted by all Builder cards in the tribe.

    getBuildingCards()
    Returns the list of building cards the player owns.
    CONNECTION_STATUS
    getConnection()
    Returns the current connection status of the player.
    int
    getFood()
    Returns the player's current food amount.
    int
    getGatherDiscount()
    Returns the food penalty reduction granted by Gatherer cards during a sustenance event (3 per Gatherer).
    int
    getHunterNumber()
    Returns the number of Hunter cards in the player's tribe.
    String
    getNickname()
    Returns the player's nickname.
    int
    getNumberOfCard()
    Returns the total number of cards in the player's tribe.
    int
    getNumberOfDifferentInventorIcon()
    Returns the number of distinct inventor icons in the player's tribe.

    getObservers()
    Returns the list of subscribed observers.
    int
    getPrestigePoint()
    Returns the player's current prestige-point total.
    int
    getShamanStarTotal()
    Returns the total number of Shaman stars across all Shaman cards in the tribe.
    Totem

    Returns the player's totem.

    Re-fires notifyCardAddedToTribe for every card currently in this player's tribe.

    Requests an extra card draw on behalf of this player (triggered by a building effect).

    Restores the player's building cards.

    Sets the connection status of the player.

    Triggers all end-game building effects owned by this player.

    Triggers all end-round building effects owned by this player.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String nickname, COLOR color)
      Builds a player with the provided nickname and totem color.
      Parameters:
      nickname - player's nickname
      color - totem color

    • Player

      public Player(String nickname, COLOR color, ServerVirtualView virtualView)
      Builds a player and subscribes the provided virtual view as observer.
      Parameters:
      nickname - player's nickname
      color - totem color
      virtualView - observer to bind

    • Player

      public Player(PlayerDTO playerDTO)
      Builds a player from a DTO snapshot.
      Parameters:
      playerDTO - player data transfer object

  • Method Details

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Returns the player's nickname.
      Returns:
      nickname.

    • manageFoodAndPP

      public void manageFoodAndPP(int foodAmount)
      Updates the player's food amount. If food would go below zero, the deficit is converted into prestige-point loss at a ratio of 2 PP per missing food, then food is clamped to zero.
      Parameters:
      foodAmount - delta to apply to food (positive or negative)

    • tryBuyBuilding

      public void tryBuyBuilding(BuildingCard selectedBuildingCard) throws NotEnoughFoodException
      Attempts to purchase a building card.
      Parameters:
      selectedBuildingCard - building to buy
      Throws:
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the card

    • managePP

      public void managePP(int PPamount)
      Updates player's prestige points.
      Parameters:
      PPamount - delta to apply (positive or negative)

    • getConnection

      public CONNECTION_STATUS getConnection()
      Returns the current connection status of the player.
      Returns:
      the player's CONNECTION_STATUS

    • setConnection

      public void setConnection(CONNECTION_STATUS connectionStatus)
      Sets the connection status of the player.
      Parameters:
      connectionStatus - the new CONNECTION_STATUS

    • addCardToTribe

      public void addCardToTribe(Card card)
      Adds a non-building card to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      card - card to add

    • addBuilding

      public void addBuilding(BuildingCard buildingCard)
      Adds a building card to the player's building area.
      Parameters:
      buildingCard - building card to add

    • getFood

      public int getFood()
      Returns the player's current food amount.
      Returns:
      food amount

    • getPrestigePoint

      public int getPrestigePoint()
      Returns the player's current prestige-point total.
      Returns:
      prestige points

    • getNumberOfDifferentInventorIcon

      public int getNumberOfDifferentInventorIcon()
      Returns the number of distinct inventor icons in the player's tribe.
      Returns:
      count of unique INV_ICON values

    • getShamanStarTotal

      public int getShamanStarTotal()
      Returns the total number of Shaman stars across all Shaman cards in the tribe.
      Returns:
      the sum of star values for all Shaman cards.

    • getBuilderDiscount

      public int getBuilderDiscount()
      Returns the total food discount granted by all Builder cards in the tribe.
      Returns:
      the sum of food discounts across all Builder cards.

    • getGatherDiscount

      public int getGatherDiscount()
      Returns the food penalty reduction granted by Gatherer cards during a sustenance event (3 per Gatherer).
      Returns:
      the total food discount from Gatherer cards.

    • getHunterNumber

      public int getHunterNumber()
      Returns the number of Hunter cards in the player's tribe.
      Returns:
      the hunter count.

    • getArtistNumber

      public int getArtistNumber()
      Returns the number of Artist cards in the player's tribe.
      Returns:
      the artist count.

    • getNumberOfCard

      public int getNumberOfCard()
      Returns the total number of cards in the player's tribe.
      Returns:
      the tribe size.

    • triggerEndRoundBuilding

      public void triggerEndRoundBuilding()
      Triggers all end-round building effects owned by this player.

    • triggerEndGameBuilding

      public void triggerEndGameBuilding()
      Triggers all end-game building effects owned by this player.

      Returns all cards in the player's tribe.

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(PlayerObserver observerToAdd)
      Subscribes an observer.
      Parameters:
      observerToAdd - observer to subscribe

    • getObservers

      public List<PlayerObserver> getObservers()
      Returns the list of subscribed observers.
      Returns:
      observer list.

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(PlayerObserver observerToRemove)
      Unsubscribes an observer.
      Parameters:
      observerToRemove - observer to unsubscribe

    • notifyCurrentTribe

      public void notifyCurrentTribe()
      Re-fires notifyCardAddedToTribe for every card currently in this player's tribe. Used when resuming a saved game so observers that registered after the cards were originally drawn can still receive the full tribe state.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Two players are equal if they share the same nickname and totem.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • requestExtraDraw

      public void requestExtraDraw()
      Requests an extra card draw on behalf of this player (triggered by a building effect).

    • checkpoints

      public int checkpoints()
      Computes the end-game prestige points earned from tribe cards: artists (every 2 = 10 PP), builders (fixed PP per card), and inventors (count × number of distinct inventor icons).
      Returns:
      total end-game prestige points from tribe cards.

    • createMemento

      public PlayerMemento createMemento()
      Creates a memento capturing the current player state: nickname, totem colour, food amount, prestige points, tribe serialised as DTOs, and owned building IDs.
      Specified by:
      createMemento in interface MementoManager<PlayerMemento>
      Returns:
      a PlayerMemento representing the player snapshot.

    • restoreMemento

      public void restoreMemento(PlayerMemento memento)
      Restores the player state from the provided memento: food, prestige points, and tribe. Buildings are restored separately via restoreBuildings(List).
      Specified by:
      restoreMemento in interface MementoManager<PlayerMemento>
      Parameters:
      memento - the PlayerMemento from which to restore the player state.

    • restoreBuildings

      public void restoreBuildings(List<BuildingCard> buildings)
      Restores the player's building cards. Called by Game.restoreMemento after building cards have been recreated via BuildingFactory.
      Parameters:
      buildings - the fully initialised building cards to assign to this player.
